import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(l)
    l
  when None
    ""
  end

  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let n = parts.len()

  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      p
    when None
      ""
    end
    let num = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    nums = list.push(nums, num)
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut sorted = true
  mut j = 1
  while j < n
    let prev = match nums.get(j - 1)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    let curr = match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if curr < prev
      sorted = false
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
  Ok(())
end
